repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.build.bazel: BUILD files and Starlark, hermetic builds, deps and visibility, remote cache and execution, bazel query, bzlmod
style a responsive navbar with CSS

retrieval_query: bazel BUILD starlark hermetic remote cache deps visibility bazel query bzlmod incremental action graph

validation_smoke.name: code.build.bazel L3 validation smoke
signals: a second build with no source changes is fully served from cache with no actions executed
bazel query confirms the actual dependency edges match the intended graph
the same target built on two machines produces byte-identical outputs
a remote-cache hit rate stays high across clean checkouts because actions are hermetic

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.build.bazel diagnosis smoke
signals: a build passes locally but fails remotely because it relied on an undeclared system tool
an output changes between builds despite identical inputs, indicating non-determinism
a target depends on another it must not reach, revealed by a visibility violation
the cache never hits because an action embeds an absolute path or timestamp
a tiny source edit rebuilds far more than expected due to an over-broad dependency
